text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day before the mini concert!<n>When I arrive
at the venue, the four<n>performers are already
there.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Our support has<n>arrived! Hehe.
Tell me, did you<n>volunteer to help with the concert
for<n>the chance to see me backstage?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's clearly not the case.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll d-do my best and try not to<n>s-step on
anyone's feet!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Relax, Doto. The concert's going to<n>be great
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They begin their rehearsal. All of<n>Narita Top
Road's practice seems to<n>be paying off up until—

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I didn't mean to hit my<n>hand against
the set piece!

text_block_list.name: Stage Director
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this stage is a bit smaller than<n>we hoped for.
Sorry, can you adjust<n>your choreography a little
and keep<n>your movements tighter?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: (Spin in place, spin in place—agh!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pow!

text_block_list.name: Stage Director
text_block_list.text:
Let's change this part up a little. Top<n>Road, instead
of dancing with<n>everyone, we'll have you sing a
solo<n>here!

text_block_list.name: Stage Director
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry about these last-minute<n>changes. We'll
do our best to adjust<n>the staging to make the
most of the<n>performance!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm sorry. I should be adapting to<n>the changes
better...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going back to training.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, that's a vote of confidence from<n>Ayabe. It's
as though to say we<n>needn't squander time
worrying for<n>Top Road—she'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: R-right! Top Road always comes<n>through!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! Oh, our dear rival, Narita Top<n>Road! I, the
Overlord, vouch for your<n>skill! She will surely be
transformed<n>by the time of dawn's arrival!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Director! Can you give me until<n>tomorrow? I
promise I'll master the<n>choreography by then!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: One! Two! One, two, three!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... One more time! I'mgoing to keep going until I get it right!
choice_data_list: Take it slowly. You don't want to rush this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The choreography isn't new to her.<n>She just
needs to remember all the<n>effort she's put in up
till now.
choice_data_list: You've put in the work, so draw upon it now!
You've put in the work, so draw upon it now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...Draw upon the work I've put in?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
(That's right... I'm not learning this<n>dance for the
first time. I already<n>know how it goes!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
(I've poured so much of myself into<n>this so I can
meet everyone's<n>expectations!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You're a hundred percent right. All the<n>work I've
done wasn't for nothing. I<n>won't waste the
efforts I've made!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
First, I have to get a grasp on what<n>I'm dealing
with, then I have to<n>analyze the situation!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I just have to stay calm and tackle<n>the issues I'm
having. I'm going to<n>review the recording of our
rehearsal!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Aaand there! Huff... Huff... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
This will definitely convince the<n>director I'm ready
too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Right now, I feel like I can do<n>anything!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Like, for instance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the next day, just before the<n>concert. The time
for Narita Top Road<n>to show off the fruits of her
labor has<n>come!

text_block_list.name: Stage Director
text_block_list.text:
What?! Top Road... Are you sure you<n>want to do
both?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I'm positive! Here, let me show youthat I can! Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Accelerating now! ♪ Never backing<n>down! There's
a place I'm meant to<n>be! ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-wow! She's singing and dancing<n>at the same
time?! Her voice is so<n>strong and stable too!

text_block_list.name: Stage Director
text_block_list.text:
Magnificent! I'm shocked! Yes, go<n>ahead and sing
and dance<n>simultaneously on stage! The<n>audience
will love it for sure!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Thank you so much! I'll do all I<n>can to wow the
crowd!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though fear may rob you of all hope,<n>through the
dark forest and beyond<n>our expectations shall you
go... Yes!<n>Ahh, how brilliant!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer. Because<n>of you, I
was able to believe in myself<n>and do my best!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... Hehe! Is that supposed to be an<n>imitation of
what I said when we<n>were helping my classmates
with<n>their makeup test?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's time to do this. We'll show<n>you what
we're really made of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road flashes me a<n>sparkling smile
before she heads on<n>stage.
